title: Live Arrival Guarantee
description: Let customers opt in to a live arrival promise at checkout. Handle claims in one place — no back-and-forth emails.

title: Seasonal Shop Windows
description: Open and close products by season automatically. Customers get notified the moment their plant is back in stock.

title: Wholesale Made Easy
description: Run a B2B tier with minimum order quantities and tiered pricing — no spreadsheets, no separate system.

title: Monthly Plant Boxes
description: Offer recurring mystery boxes or replenishment subscriptions. Billing is handled automatically every month.

title: Scientific Names & Grex
description: Tag every listing with proper genus, species, grex and ICPS conservation status. Collectors and enthusiasts notice.

title: Growth Stage Labels
description: Show buyers exactly what stage a plant is at — flask, deflask, established, or mature. No guessing.

title: Origin & Source Badges
description: Proudly display where your plants come from — TC lab, in-house breeding, wild collected with permits.

title: Printable Care Cards
description: Every order includes a professional care sheet for the plant. Buyers save it, share it, and come back.

title: Grower's Journal
description: Buyers post updates and photos of their plants growing over time. Real social proof, built right into your store.

title: My Plant Collection
description: Customers build a personal collection from everything they've bought from you — encouraging loyalty and repeat orders.

title: TC Batch Traceability
description: Show full propagation provenance for tissue-culture plants — lab batch, lineage, QR labels. Builds serious collector trust.

title: Climate Zone Checker
description: Shoppers enter their PIN code and your site instantly tells them if a plant suits their region's climate.

title: ERP Sync
description: Sync orders, stock levels, and customers with ERPNext automatically. No double-entry, no reconciliation headaches.

title: Dispatch Logger
description: Record packing conditions, temperature, and carrier per shipment. Solid evidence if there's ever a delivery dispute.

title: Phytosanitary Docs
description: Attach inspection certificates and import permits directly to products. Stay compliant without the paperwork pile.

title: AI SEO + Quick Add
description: AI writes your product meta descriptions and alt text. Add new plants in seconds with taxonomy intelligence built in.
